description:
Follow-up under sbdpi-swx.6.4 after seeing duplicate reviewer-gate starts for the same delegated worker.

Scope:
- prevent concurrent post-worker inspection / reviewer / landing passes from running twice against the same worker runtime
- reuse or await the in-flight orchestration work instead of starting duplicate reviewer commands
- keep `/bw workers`, background supervision, and turn-end inspection behavior truthful while avoiding duplicate notices / duplicate review passes
- add regression coverage for overlapping inspections on one worker

Goal: one worker should have at most one reviewer/landing orchestration pass in flight at a time.
title: Serialize reviewer and landing orchestration per worker
